url_registry.test_canonical_url_description: Enter a canonical URL to test how OCL will resolve it in a specific namespace, such as your user workspace or an organization that you are a member of. Use this to simulate how OCL will evaluate references and mappings in your repositories. <0>Learn more at OCL Docs</0>
url_registry.resolve_success_with_entry: {{url}} resolved to <0/> in <1/> using an entry in the <2/> Registry
url_registry.resolve_success_without_entry: {{url}} resolved to <0/> in <1/> by matching a repository in the <2/>
url_registry.resolve_failed_with_entry: {{url}} matched an entry in the <0/> Registry but did not resolve to a repository
url_registry.resolve_failed_without_entry: {{url}} did not match an entry in the <0/> Registry or the Global Registry and did not resolve to a repository
url_registry.resolve_failed_without_entry_global: {{url}} did not match an entry in the Global Registry

locale.custom_language_code_warning: OCL is optimized for 2-letter and 4-letter language codes (e.g. "en" or "en-GB"). Only use custom codes if absolutely necessary.
locale.custom_language_code_helper_multiple: Custom language codes may only have letters and hyphens, e.g. "eng". Use a comma or space to separate multiple custom codes
locale.custom_language_code_helper_single: Custom language code may only have letters and hyphens, e.g. "eng".
locale.custom_language_code_validation_multiple: Letters and "-" are allowed for language codes. Comma or space can be used to separate custom codes if applicable. No other characters e.g. numbers are accepted.
locale.custom_language_code_validation_single: Letters and "-" are allowed for language code. No other characters e.g. numbers are accepted.
locale.custom_language_code_tooltip: Language codes in OCL use the syntax "en" or "en-GB" in accordance with ISO 639-1, with an optional 2-letter country code following BCP47. OCL allows language codes in other formats, however these codes may limit certain features or be incompatible with client systems, like OpenMRS. Letters and "-" are allowed for language codes.
locale.iso_639_1_support_note: OCL's data model supports ISO-639-1 (two digit) codes as standard. Consider updating.

map_project.upload_file_description: Upload a spreadsheet (.csv, .xls, .xlsx) that contains the input data to be mapped.
map_project.target_repository_description: Select the repository that you want to map your input data to.
map_project.filter_name_locales_helper: Note: Restricting candidates to specific languages limits cross-lingual matching capabilities, but may improve the accuracy of results for certain datasets, especially if the input data is in the same language as a target repository's default language.
map_project.matching_algorithm_description: Select a matching algorithm. Learn more
map_project.custom_match_api_description: Configure External Match API URL and Token
map_project.score_configuration_description: Configure Score threshold to group candidates recommendations
map_project.field_configuration_description: Associate fields in the input data to fields that the matching algorithms are able to understand. Assign input fields that contain concept codes or mappings to specific repositories. Learn more
map_project.delete_map_project_warning: This will delete the map project and its decisions and uploaded file.
map_project.delete_map_project_confirm: Are you sure want to permanently delete this map project {{name}}?
map_project.semantic_search_not_configured: {{owner}}:{{repo}}:{{version}} is not configured to run Semantic Search
map_project.no_valid_columns_for_matching: None of the columns are valid for matching, please edit and assign valid columns.
map_project.algorithm_es_description: Token and Keyword based search using ES
map_project.algorithm_llm_description: Vector based search powered by MiniLM
map_project.auto_match_unmapped_only_note: Note: Skip {{count}} input rows that are already proposed
map_project.auto_match_unmapped_only_note_no_count: Note: Skip input rows that are already proposed
map_project.auto_match_note: Note: This will not affect {{approvedCount}} approved input rows but will override {{proposedCount}} proposed input rows
map_project.auto_match_note_no_counts: Note: This will not affect approved input rows but will override proposed input rows
map_project.run_ai_analysis_note: Note: Enabling this feature will run AI Analysis on results of each row. This has direct cost implications.
map_project.mapped_to_column: Mapped to column {{columnName}} from input sheet
map_project.save_this_project_to_collection: Save target concepts to a collection
map_project.concepts_will_be_added_to_this_collectio: {{count}} concepts will be added to the collection <0>{{collectionName}}</0>
map_project.all_approved_and_proposed_target_concept: All approved and proposed target concepts
map_project.would_you_like_to_cascade: Would you like to also include associated Concepts and Mappings?
map_project.no_only_include_the_selected_resources: No, only include the selected resources
map_project.yes_include_associated_mappings_from_sam: Yes, include associated Mappings from the same source
map_project.yes_include_associated_mappings_and_targ: Yes, include associated Mappings and target Concepts from the same source
map_project.openmrs_cascade_tooltip: Includes associated Mappings and target Concepts from the same source, and recursively adds any of their associated answer and set member concepts and mappings (e.g. Q-AND-A and CONCEPT-SET mappings)
map_project.transform_to_extensional_tooltip_1: Using this checkbox will instruct OCL to create separate references for each individual concept or mapping (i.e. 'extensional' or 'one-to-one' references).
map_project.transform_to_extensional_tooltip_2: Uncheck this box to instruct OCL to create fewer references that can represent multiple concepts and mappings (i.e. 'intentional' or 'one-to-many' references). See this <0>YouTube video</0> for details.
map_project.bridge_terminology_search_description: Include mappings in the <0>CIEL Interface Terminology</0> to identify additional high quality candidates. Only available for compatible target repositories and matching algorithms.
